fedwatch.interpretation: Hold is still the base case, but pricing became more hawkish because the hike probability increased by 16.0 percentage points.

key_catalyst.reason: The minutes can confirm or challenge the hawkish repricing visible in FedWatch probabilities and Treasury yields.

bullish_factors: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 rose over the week.
VIX fell, indicating lower market fear.
A rate hold remains the most likely Fed outcome.
bearish_factors: The probability of a hike is material at 34.2%.
The 10-year Treasury yield rose during the period.
Oil prices rose, adding inflation pressure.
data_limitations: A DXY value is not visible in the supplied evidence, so it is not reported.
AP News and Earnings Whispers are not used in this verified snapshot.
The report distinguishes facts, market expectations and agent opinion.
